implemented_mitigations.invariant: A duplicated sidecar fd is synced outside fd_lock; dirty flags are cleared only if the captured dirty epoch still matches after reacquiring fd_lock.
implemented_mitigations.name: dirty-sidecar fdatasync outside fd_lock
implemented_mitigations.remaining_limit: Dirty-flag fault coverage and broad same-FD concurrency evidence are still missing.

implemented_mitigations.invariant: A generation high-water mark is checkpointed before ciphertext generation; same-file publish turns remain ordered while prepare/crypto run outside commit_lock.
implemented_mitigations.name: strict generation reservation and publish ticket
implemented_mitigations.remaining_limit: Durable-publish lock splitting and broad contention evidence are still missing.

implemented_mitigations.invariant: The live fd write buffer is copied under fd_lock, cleared, and protected by a pending-job reference before prepare/crypto/publish run without fd_lock.
implemented_mitigations.name: write-buffer snapshot outside fd_lock
implemented_mitigations.remaining_limit: External process client-count smoke and strace blocking-syscall evidence exist, but long-duration client-count and scheduler off-CPU evidence are still missing.

implemented_mitigations.invariant: The read path snapshots sidecar fds, key material, file id, visible size, and committed generation under fd_lock, then authenticates blocks outside fd_lock while a pending-job reference prevents release from closing the fds.
implemented_mitigations.name: authenticated-read snapshot outside fd_lock
implemented_mitigations.remaining_limit: External process client-count smoke and strace blocking-syscall evidence exist, but scheduler off-CPU profiling and long-duration client-count paths still need lock-contract evidence.

implemented_mitigations.invariant: Truncate and fallocate snapshot fd state, hold a publish turn for same-file ordering, perform xattr/ftruncate/checkpoint work outside fd_lock and commit_lock, then update visible state with short lock holds.
implemented_mitigations.name: metadata resize publication outside hot locks
implemented_mitigations.remaining_limit: Strace blocking-syscall evidence exists, but scheduler off-CPU profiling and long-duration deadlock/livelock stress still need lock-contract evidence.

implemented_mitigations.invariant: Release waits for pending jobs, detaches sidecar fds, write buffer, and file-state reference under fd_lock, marks the context invalid, then closes/frees/releases detached resources after unlocking.
implemented_mitigations.name: release lifecycle detach outside fd_lock
implemented_mitigations.remaining_limit: Close/free latency is no longer in fd_lock and the smoke includes repeated thread/process lifecycle phases plus blocking-syscall evidence, but scheduler off-CPU and long-duration evidence are still missing.

negative_claim_guard: This table is a measurement scaffold, not evidence that Gate 0.15 is closed.

order.protected_state: per-FD validity, write buffer, logical size cache, sidecar dirty flags, QoS class, pending-job counter
per-inode generation high-water, reader-visible committed generation, publish tickets, and checkpoint-visible logical size

scope: Current strict-path lock order and known violations before Gate 0.15 refactor.
